allow: Bash(grep -oiE '<h[1-6][^>]*>\([^<]|<[^h]\)+</h[1-6]>' /tmp/smove.html | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g' | head -30; echo "---SECTIONS---"; grep -oiE '<section[^>]*>' /tmp/smove.html | head -20; echo "---IMAGES---"; grep -oiE 'src="[^"]+\\.\(png|jpg|jpeg|webp|svg|gif|mp4|webm\)"' /tmp/smove.html | sort -u)
